comparedAgainst: ERPNext (clean-room reimplementation from official docs; NOT a clone, NO source copied)
disclaimer: ERPNext is a very large, mature system. These scores are an HONEST self-assessment of a single-sprint clean-room core. They are NOT a claim of ERPNext compatibility, certification, or full parity.
method: Each category scored 0-100 vs ERPNext's documented capability, with parityStatus in {Full, StrongPartial, Partial, Skeleton, Missing}. Evidence is real code + passing tests.

categories.erpnext: Company, Fiscal Year, Currency, Chart of Accounts, Cost Center, Numbering/Naming, Taxes, multi-company, multi-warehouse
categories.generated: Company, FiscalYear, Currency, hierarchical CoA w/ RootType, CostCenter (entity), NumberingSeries (working), TaxTemplate (applied), multi-company (schema), multi-warehouse

categories.erpnext: Double-entry GL, JE, Payment, AR, AP, GL/Trial Balance/P&L/Balance Sheet, period closing
categories.generated: Double-entry GL posting (invoices/payments/JE), unbalanced-voucher rejection, AR, AP, General Ledger, Trial Balance
categories.gaps: No P&L, Balance Sheet, aging, period closing, multi-currency revaluation

categories.erpnext: Item, Warehouse, Stock Ledger, valuation (FIFO/MA), Stock Entry, reconciliation, batch/serial
categories.generated: Item, Warehouse, immutable Stock Ledger, moving-average valuation, stock balance, negative-stock guard, reversal on cancel
categories.gaps: No standalone Stock Entry/reconciliation, FIFO, batch/serial, multi-UOM conversion

categories.erpnext: Customer, Quotation, Sales Order, Sales Invoice, Delivery Note, returns, pricing rules
categories.generated: Customer, Sales Order (create), Sales Invoice with full workflow + GL + stock posting
categories.gaps: No Quotation, Delivery Note, credit notes/returns, pricing/discount rules

categories.erpnext: Supplier, RFQ, Purchase Order, Purchase Receipt, Purchase Invoice, returns
categories.generated: Supplier, Purchase Order (create), Purchase Invoice with full workflow + GL + stock receipt
categories.gaps: No RFQ, separate Purchase Receipt, debit notes/returns

categories.erpnext: Lead, Opportunity, customer conversion, campaigns (separate app in v15)
categories.generated: Lead, Opportunity, lead->customer conversion

categories.erpnext: Project, Task, Timesheet, billing
categories.generated: Project, ProjectTask with approval gating

categories.erpnext: Issue/HD Ticket, SLA, escalation (Helpdesk separate app)
categories.generated: SupportTicket, escalate, resolve (reason required)

categories.erpnext: Asset, depreciation schedules, maintenance, disposal
categories.generated: Asset, maintenance scheduling flag

categories.erpnext: BOM, Work Order, Job Card, Quality Inspection
categories.generated: none

categories.erpnext: Employee, Salary, Leave, Attendance (HRMS separate app)
categories.generated: none

categories.erpnext: Web pages, Webshop, portal
categories.generated: none

categories.erpnext: POS Profile, POS Invoice, offline POS
categories.generated: none

categories.erpnext: Hundreds of query/script reports + report builder + dashboards
categories.generated: General Ledger, Trial Balance, Stock Balance, AR/AP (via API + UI)

categories.erpnext: Configurable workflow (states, transitions, roles), docstatus, submit/cancel/amend
categories.generated: Maker/checker engine: submit/approve/reject, amount threshold, mandatory reject reason, immutable posted docs, reversal-not-edit
categories.gaps: Workflow states are code-driven for 4 doctypes; no fully data-driven multi-state designer UI

categories.erpnext: Role permissions, permission levels, user permissions, docstatus perms
categories.generated: RolePermission matrix enforced (read/create/write/submit/approve/cancel) + maker/checker
categories.gaps: No field-level (perm level) or row-level user permissions

categories.erpnext: Version doctype, activity log, docstatus history
categories.generated: AuditEvent recorded on every create/submit/approve/reject/cancel with actor + details

categories.erpnext: Auto REST for every doctype + RPC methods + token/key-secret auth
categories.generated: REST for core entities + reports + workflow/audit; POST + submit/approve/cancel for Sales Invoice; DomainException->400
categories.gaps: Not auto-generated for every entity; no RPC method API; dev-cookie auth only

categories.erpnext: Data Import tool for every doctype, export, templates
categories.generated: CSV import + export for Customer with per-row error capture (ImportBatch)

categories.erpnext: Custom fields, property setter, client/server scripts, naming series
categories.generated: NumberingSeries (working); ReportDefinition (registry). No custom-field UI

categories.erpnext: bench, MariaDB, Redis, workers, containers
categories.generated: Single ASP.NET Core app; runs on SQLite (zero-dep) or SQL Server; EnsureCreated + seed on startup
categories.gaps: No EF migrations (EnsureCreated), no container/orchestration, single-process

categories.erpnext: Large server + UI test suites
categories.generated: 74 xUnit tests (domain + API/UI integration) + 12 Playwright browser tests, all passing

categories.erpnext: Full auth, encryption, 2FA, permission engine
categories.generated: RBAC matrix, maker/checker, dev-cookie auth (production binds to Windows/SSO)
categories.gaps: No real authentication, credential storage, encryption, 2FA

categories.erpnext: Full CRUD desk UI, list/form/report views, dashboards
categories.generated: 9 read-oriented Razor pages + dev-auth login; no create/edit forms in UI yet (records via API/services)

categories.erpnext: Extensive official docs
categories.generated: Architecture, DB design, security, workflow, API, reporting, controls, UAT, demo, parity + license docs

verdict: POC-grade clean-room ERP core: a genuinely working, tested double-entry + inventory + maker/checker spine across ~9 of ERPNext's modules. NOT full ERPNext parity; manufacturing/HR/POS/website are absent and selling/buying/CRM are partial. Honest overall ERPNext-grade ~36%.
